positive: An abstract, geometric celestial map featuring deep indigo and sapphire blue gradients against a rich matte black background. The central subject is a stylized constellation composed of interconnected, glowing neon-cyan and gold line art, resembling cosmic dust streams and ancient astronomical diagrams. Incorporate minimalist, symmetrical floral mandalas intertwined with geometric star clusters, creating a sense of organized celestial wonder. The style should be modern line art, highly detailed, with clean silhouettes and high contrast, suitable for repeating textile print or single chest placement. Cinematic, volumetric light source from the constellations, making the lines appear luminous. Perfect for screen printing on apparel, vector quality.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, lowres, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, illegible, graffiti, messy, cluttered, poorly rendered, photographic, realistic, 3d render
